kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Xu Ly Kich Ban Kiem Thu
Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Keyword Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given keyword exists in the current scope.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Replace Variables
kw.doc: Replaces variables in the given text with their current values.

kw.name: Replace Variables
kw.doc: Replaces variables in the given text with their current values.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Run Keyword
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: PASS: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Keyword Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given keyword exists in the current scope.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.doc: Replaces variables in the given text with their current values.

kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.arg: Step6_Arg1=xpath://h5[contains(text(),'Hệ thống tra cứu kết quả trúng tuyển năm 2025')]

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.
